How It Works
The Challenger Series
CHALLENGER SERIES
We challenge you to push yourself and your campaigns to hit specific benchmarks
and member personal bests!
Hit all five of the targets and you'll receive
An FATC Certification badge for your site (and client proposals)
A personal testimonial from Cat
Showcase in our monthly membership hall of fame!
What Is The Challenger
Series?
The Challenger Series is a set of targets to hit that will test your skills as a Facebook
marketer. If you successfully hit each of the targets, you'll earn a certification badge
for that niche, and a testimonial video from Cat, both of which you can utilise to land
clients.
How Does It Work?
When you hit one of the challenges in a RECENT (within the last 2 weeks) client
campaign, post a screenshot to the group (feel free to blur out account ID) explaining
how and what you did to achieve the specific metric. Make sure your post includes
your method, and mentions "Challenger Series" so we can find it.
Criteria of entry:
Screenshot can't be older than two weeks (please include date range
in screenshot)
You must explain how or what you did along with your screenshot inside the
private FB Group (ie don't just post results, explain the set up so others can
learn from it)
It must be one of the challenger targets and meet all of the criteria for that
target. Be sure to mention which target you're posting about
Complete
Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
Contact Support
